title: The Blood Warfare
overview: The Soul Society is observing a sudden surge in the number of Hollows being destroyed.

title: Foundation Stones
overview: Arrancars Nel Tu and Pesche Guatiche have come to seek Ichigo’s help explaining that Hueco Mundo is under attack by an unknown enemy. Unable to ignore the situation, Ichigo and his friends decide to set out for Hueco Mundo.

title: March of the Starcross
overview: Ichigo and his friends arrive in Hueco Mundo to confront Quilge Opie and learn that their latest enemy are Quincies.

title: Kill the Shadow
overview: The Wandenreich mobilizes its elite force, the Stern Ritter, to annihilate the Soul Society. Creating massive flaming pillars of Reishi as a distraction, the Stern Ritter easily enter the Soul Society to bring carnage to the Soul Reapers.

title: Wrath as a Lightning
overview: Quilge Opie uses his power to imprison Ichigo inside the Garganta. As he tries to break free, Ichigo begins to hear, through his Soul Phone, the screams of the Soul Reapers falling to the enemy's onslaught.

title: The Fire
overview: Shigekuni Genryusai Yamamoto confronts Yhwach for the first time in a thousand years. As Yhwach finally draws his sword against Genryusai, the Soul Reapers notice an abnormal change taking place across the Seireitei.

title: Born in the Dark
overview: Shigekuni Genryusai Yamamoto learns that the Yhwach he defeated was an impostor. The real Yhwach then reveals himself and easily kills Genryusai, sending a wave of shock and devastation across the Soul Reapers.

title: The Shooting Star Project [Zero Mix]
overview: Rescue efforts are being made across the Seireitei to find and help those who've survived the Stern Ritter attack. Meanwhile, Ichigo meets with Mayuri Kurotsuchi about fixing his broken Tensa Zangetsu.

title: The Drop
overview: Squad Zero brings Ichigo back to the Royal Palace to prepare for the coming battle. Meanwhile, Kyoraku is appointed as the new Head Captain to lead the Thirteen Court Guard Squads.

title: The Battle
overview: Kenpachi Zaraki removes his eye patch to fight Retsu Unohana, a.k.a. Yachiru Unohana, “The First Kenpachi.” Meanwhile, Ichigo and Renji head to Hoohden to meet Oh-Etsu Nimaiya, the man who is said to have created the Zanpakuto.

title: Everything but the Rain
overview: Ichigo is kicked out of the Royal Palace by Oh-etsu Nimaiya for failing his test. When Ichigo next opens his eyes, he finds himself standing in front of his house in the World of the Living.

title: Everything but the Rain: June Truth
overview: Squad 10 Captain Isshin Shiba of the Thirteen Court Guard Squads decides to not report his encounter with the Quincy named Masaki Kurosaki in the World of the Living to the Head Captain.

title: The Blade Is Me
overview: Ichigo learns that he is the child born of a Soul Reaper and a Quincy. Finally understanding the truth behind his heritage, Ichigo decides to return to Hoohden with a renewed resolve to finish what he has started.

title: The Last 9 Days
overview: Ichigo prepares to leave the Royal Palace to return to the Seireitei but is stopped by Hyosube, who claims that Ichigo cannot defeat Yhwach as he is now.

title: PEACE FROM SHADOWS
overview: Yhwach sets his plan to end the world in nine days in motion.

title: THE FUNDAMENTAL VIRULENCE
overview: Mayuri receives a call from Urahara, who had stayed behind in Hueco Mundo.

title: HEART OF WOLF
overview: The Stern Ritters drive the Soul Reapers deeper into a corner.

title: RAGES AT RINGSIDE
overview: Kensei Muguruma joins the battle against Masculine.

title: THE WHITE HAZE
overview: A fearless Rukia takes on Äs Nödt.

title: I AM THE EDGE
overview: Isane and Yachiru are attacked by Gwenael.

title: THE HEADLESS STAR
overview: Candice, Meninas, Giselle, and Liltotto try to take down Kenpachi.

title: MARCHING OUT THE ZOMBIES
overview: Ichigo tries to stop Yhwach upon learning that his real target lies within the Royal Palace.

title: MARCHING OUT THE ZOMBIES 2
overview: Ikkaku, Yumichika, and the Arrancars work together to fight off Giselle’s zombies.

title: TOO EARLY TO WIN TOO LATE TO KNOW
overview: Yhwach finally enters the Royal Palace.

title: THE MASTER
overview: Yhwach confronts Hyosube, who is protecting the real Royal Palace.

title: BLACK
overview: Yhwach performs Auswählen to bestow power to his fallen Royal Guards.

title: A
overview: The battle between Squad Zero and Yhwach's Royal Guards for the Soul King rages on.

title: KILL THE KING
overview: Ichigo and his friends hurry to the Reio Greater Palace to stop Yhwach.

title: THE DARK ARM
overview: Ichigo tries to remove the impaled sword from the Soul King and save his life.

title: THE BETRAYER
overview: Ukitake takes the place of the slain Soul King by releasing the power of Mimihagi.

title: AGAINST THE JUDGEMENT
overview: Yhwach is overflowing with power from having absorbed the Soul King.

title: THE HOLY NEWBORN
overview: The Soul Reapers regroup to prepare their counterattack against the Quincies.

title: GATE OF THE SUN
overview: Yhwach builds his new castle, Wahr Welt.

title: BABY, HOLD YOUR HAND
overview: Kenpachi and Mayuri's group advance through Vier Ast.

title: DON'T CHASE A SHADOW
overview: The change in Mayuri's Spiritual Pressure is also felt elsewhere by Urahara and Kyoraku.

title: BABY, HOLD YOUR HAND 2 [NEVER ENDING MY DREAM]
overview: Nemu ignores Mayuri's orders by intervening in his battle against Pernida.

title: SHADOWS GONE
overview: Lille undergoes further transformation to hunt down and pass judgment on Kyoraku.

title: FRIEND
overview: As the battle between the soul reapers and the quincies rages, Haschwalt finds himself confronted by Bazz-B inside Wahrwelt

title: THE VISIBLE ANSWER
overview: Kyoraku has paved the way for the soul reapers to reach the enemy's stronghold within Wahrwelt, but Gerard Valkyrie prevents them from advancing any further.

title: MY LAST WORDS
overview: Haschwalt suddenly attacks Uryu to pass judgement. The ensuing explosion and smoke draw Ichigo to the scene where he and Uryu are reunited.
